data.body: CI on identity stack: 673/675/676 green; 678(245e)+679(1787) failed on a REAL test — test_reviewbot_ensure_tickets pinned the old reviewbot email 'rebar-review-bot@navateam.com' which 245e intentionally changed to the bot email. Updated that test assertion (folded into 245e via fixup+autosquash; reviewbot test 4 passed). Re-pushed all 6 (new patchsets, same Change-Ids). Awaiting CI re-run to close tasks->297d->epic->land.
